[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: One anime-style illustration shows a young woman in a dark coat and plaid scarf holding the scarf near her neck against a twilight sky background with stylized glowing elements and large title text.

Main Subject:
An anime-style young woman with long dark hair tied with flowing strands, blue eyes, and a partial profile view faces to the right while clutching a light-and-dark checkered plaid scarf with one hand. She wears a dark, double-breasted coat with large buttons and a raised collar, plus a dark underscarf or neck area visible beneath the coat. Her mouth is slightly open, and her gaze is directed off to the right.

Setting:
The background is an outdoor-looking twilight sky with purple and blue tones, soft cloud-like gradients, and a few faint glowing light spots or vertical streaks. The overall lighting is cool-toned, with highlights on her face and hair.

Visual Details:
The composition is vertically framed with the character occupying the right and center portions. Her hair sweeps across the left side of the image in layered strands, creating motion-like flow. The coat falls in heavy folds and is shaded with dark gradients, while the scarf stands out with a high-contrast plaid pattern. There is also a semi-transparent, smoky or fog-like overlay behind the character. Large, metallic-looking title text overlays the lower center of the image, partially covering her coat.

Visible Text:
WHITCH ONTHE
HOLY NΙGHT

Practical Summary:
A stylized anime character in a dark coat and plaid scarf is shown in profile at twilight with cool lighting and flowing hair. Large overlay text reading “WHITCH ONTHE” and “HOLY NΙGHT” covers the lower portion of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
